title: athlete-enrollment — model relationships
description: One owned entity: AthleteEnrollment. Belongs to 5 aggregates directly (Tenant + Branch + Team + Athlete + Season) + references AgeGroup (snapshot) + TeamMember (atomic conversion) + TeamTrial (trial conversion). All RESTRICT outbound except tenant (CASCADE) + age_group + team_member + source_trial (SET NULL — snapshot/reference semantics). Cascades organization + region through branch. No `application_id` / `organization_id` / `region_id` / `scope_node_id` — forbidden columns.

outbound.description: Denormalised from athlete.branch_id for indexed filtering. RESTRICT. IMMUTABLE post-create.
The team the athlete is enrolled in. RESTRICT — teams cannot be archived while active enrollments reference them. Enforced by PreventEnrollmentOrphansOnTeamArchived hook.
The enrolled athlete. RESTRICT — athletes cannot be archived while active enrollments reference them. Enforced by PreventEnrollmentOrphansOnAthleteArchived hook. IMMUTABLE post-create.
The season this enrollment applies to. RESTRICT. IMMUTABLE post-create.

SNAPSHOT of athlete.current_age_group_id at EnrollmentSubmitted time. IMMUTABLE for the enrollment's lifetime — birthday drift + AgeGroup catalog changes do NOT reshape it. SET NULL when the AgeGroup is deleted (the enrollment remains valid; the snapshot survives as a historical marker until nulled).

The TeamMember row created atomically when status → active. Null until activation. SET NULL when the TeamMember is soft-deleted (usually because the athlete left the team mid-season — the enrollment already transitioned to withdrawn/expelled in that flow, so this is a redundant cleanup).
Set when enrollment_type='trial_converted'. References the TeamTrial that converted to this enrollment. SET NULL preserves the enrollment when the trial is later hard-deleted.
The User who initiated the withdrawal/expulsion.

examples: attendance::AttendanceRecord (Wave 4+) — enrollment_id references AthleteEnrollment.id for per-session attendance tracking
finance::Membership (Wave 4+) — enrollment_id references for the money side (parent pays for athlete's enrollment)
event::EventParticipant (Wave 3+) — references enrollment for the tie between team-event registration + athlete-team enrollment
inbound.onDelete: RESTRICT by convention on domain FKs referencing athlete_enrollments.id — Enrollment cascade-checks live in AthleteEnrollmentObserver.saving.

accessor_chain.description: The AthleteEnrollment model delegates presentation accessors to its aggregates.

AthleteEnrollment.requires_payment: status IN ('submitted', 'payment_pending') AND price_amount_cents > 0 AND payment_status IN ('none', 'pending', 'partial')
AthleteEnrollment.requires_consent: athlete->is_minor AND (consent_snapshot IS NULL OR consent_snapshot lacks required flags)

notes: AthleteEnrollment carries `application_id` INDIRECTLY via its Tenant.
Cascades organization + region through branch → organization/region.
team_id + athlete_id + season_id + branch_id + tenant_id are IMMUTABLE post-create. Re-pointing is an audit-trail launder.
age_group_snapshot_id is IMMUTABLE post-create — SNAPSHOT semantics. Birthday drift + AgeGroup catalog changes DO NOT reshape it.
team_member_id is populated ATOMICALLY on status → active. Direct writes outside the atomic conversion coordinator are refused.
